address: L-1665-1666, Millennium Textile Market 1, Ring Road, Surat, Gujarat, 395002, India
heroSubtitle: Partner with Todi Creations for handcrafted bridal couture, premium festive collections, and exclusive boutique manufacturing.
ctaText: Ready to build your next bridal collection?

whyPartner.title: Manufacturer Direct
whyPartner.description: Cut out the middleman. We handle design, weaving, embroidery, and finishing in-house.

whyPartner.title: Premium Hand Embroidery
whyPartner.description: Every design is detailed by hand using traditional zardozi, sequin, and thread work.

whyPartner.title: Worldwide Wholesale Supply
whyPartner.description: We supply and ship bridal ethnic collections to premium boutiques across the globe.

whyPartner.title: Premium Quality Control
whyPartner.description: Every design undergoes strict quality checks before packing. We do not customize catalog designs to ensure consistency.

faqs.question: Do you sell retail?
faqs.answer: No. We manufacture and supply exclusively to wholesale boutique owners, designers, and distributors globally.

faqs.question: What is the minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
faqs.answer: Our minimum order quantity is 25 pieces. We keep this accessible so boutiques of all sizes can partner with us.

faqs.question: Can I request custom designs or custom embroidery?
faqs.answer: No, we do not customize our designs. We only manufacture and supply our catalog collections in wholesale quantities to ensure strict quality control and timely delivery.

faqs.question: Do you export internationally?
faqs.answer: Yes, we ship worldwide. We handle customs documentation and express logistics, offering a 7-day domestic delivery and 25-day international shipping timeline.

faqs.question: What is your return and refund policy?
faqs.answer: No returns are accepted. In the rare case of a damaged product, we replace it after verification — no monetary refund is issued.
